purpose: A popover anchored to the user avatar in the ShellBar, containing profile info, preferences, and account actions. Provides consistent access to user-scoped functions (Settings, Sign Out, Help) across all SAP apps.
whenToUse: Access to user preferences, theme, language
whenNotToUse: For product switch — use ProductSwitch instead
For per-page actions — use DynamicPageTitle actions
doRules: Show user avatar + name + email at the top
Group actions by scope: Profile · Preferences · Session (with dividers)
Always include a Sign Out action as the last item
Support keyboard navigation and focus trap
dontRules: Do not put app-level actions in UserMenu — those belong elsewhere
Do not exceed 8 items — trim to essentials
Do not omit avatar/name header — user needs identity confirmation
Do not use the UserMenu for chat, notifications, or search

layoutGuidance.placement: Anchored to user avatar in ShellBar (right side)

contentGuidance.contentRules: User info + grouped preference actions + sign-out

responsiveBehavior.S: May become full-height slide-in from right

requirements: Popover has role='dialog' with aria-label='User menu'
Avatar trigger has aria-label with user name
Keyboard: Enter opens; Escape closes; Arrow keys navigate items
Focus returns to trigger on close
